The identifier of the arrival station.

toString() - Method in class model.Departure
Overrides the default toString() method to provide a human-readable string representation of a Departure object.
toString() - Method in class model.Station
Provides a string representation of the Station object, displaying the city, bus station, and train station names.
totalWeight - Variable in class graph.Graph.Path
 
trainStation - Variable in class model.Station
The unique identifier or name of the train station within this city.

type - Variable in class model.Departure
